0.text: Nodular consolidation in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

1.text: Peripherally located interlobular septal thickenings in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

2.text: Surrounding ground-glass opacities in the posterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the left lung

3.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific parenchymal nodule in the anterobasal segment of the lower lobe of the right lung

4.text: Segmental and subsegmental peribronchial thickening in both lungs
